sellingList.light: No need to connect to internet

reviewsList.name: Whisper Willow
reviewsList.comment: The light can be adjusted, the lowest brightness at night is just right as a small night light, the voice control function is also very convenient, the appearance is good-looking, can be placed horizontally or vertically, no need to get up to turn on/off the light, very satisfied.

reviewsList.name: Neon
reviewsList.comment: Night light is electric powered, can be connected to a charging plug or power bank, the sound control is really convenient, can be easily activated when getting up at night to use the bathroom, very sensitive sound control is very useful, the price is also very affordable.

reviewsList.name: Luna
reviewsList.comment: Intelligent voice-controlled bedroom night light, responsive, adjustable brightness, easy to use with voice commands to turn on and off the light. Great product.

reviewsList.name: Crimson
reviewsList.comment: The quality of the lamp is very good, and it looks great. The three types of lighting and brightness adjustment can meet daily use needs, and the response to voice control is also very fast. Friends in need can feel free to purchase.

reviewsList.name: Echo
reviewsList.comment: Voice control is convenient, the brightness of the night light is also sufficient, very useful. The plastic feel is too strong, it would be more ideal to switch to a metal material.

reviewsList.name: Serene
reviewsList.comment: The voice-controlled light has good quality, soft light, fine workmanship, affordable price, worth buying.

reviewsList.name: Solar
reviewsList.comment: I can only say it's okay, the voice prompt sensitivity is poor.

reviewsList.name: Celestial
reviewsList.comment: he product design is very innovative, but the voice recognition and voice control still need improvement. I hope after the improvement, I will continue to support you as always.

reviewsList.name: Sapphire
reviewsList.comment: The price is cheap, the functionality is satisfying, just the appearance is a bit rough, but it's worth it for this price.

reviewsList.name: Ember
reviewsList.comment: The voice-controlled light is not very responsive, I have to say it multiple times to turn it on, and it will automatically turn on at night.

reviewsList.name: Aurora
reviewsList.comment: The design style is very minimalist, just plug in the USB and it's good to go. The voice command recognition is very clear.

reviewsList.name: Radiant
reviewsList.comment: Very easy to use, can control the lights from bed.

reviewsList.name: Ethereal
reviewsList.comment: Not bad, kids really like it, just need to raise the volume a little bit.
